name: @backstage/experimental-form-decorators-to-stable
description: Rename EXPERIMENTAL_formDecorators to formDecorators in Backstage template specs for 1.51.0

scripts.test: yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/codemod.ts ./tests && yarn exec codemod jssg test -l yaml ./scripts/codemod-yaml.ts ./tests-yaml && yarn exec codemod workflow validate -w workflow.yaml
